overview: Here is how I think about funding and energy savings on Greenways.

price_upgrade_case: This is exactly why ETL-grade equipment and finance stack together.

calculators_tools: These are Greenways tools for audit → payback → funding — start with the **Product Calculator** for energy comparisons.

audit_calculator: The audit widget is your baseline — everything else builds from there.

bnpl: BNPL can smooth capex — but check merchant fees and eligibility first.

equipment_finance: Commercial kitchens often finance ETL-listed upgrades — verified efficiency de-risks the business case.

green_loans: Green-labelled bank products can sit beside grants — stack them carefully.

role_resources: These references shaped how I advise — here is the distilled version.

portals: Here are the main Greenways finance and energy entry points.

etl_products: ETL products are the verified European efficiency benchmark on Greenways — start here for upgrades.
